inline_review_comments.body: The 200ms p95 target is too tight. Given async index latency we should set 400ms.
200ms is already generous — if anything we should tighten to 100ms to stay competitive. Don't loosen it.
We should use application-level events for index updates — it gives us better observability and fits the event-sourcing pattern we're adopting in EPIC-012.
Should we add French stemming support? The Paris office uses the product.
